blockingIssues.description: Bid cancel recomputes fee reserve from current fee config rather than the placement-time locked amount, so fee updates between placement and cancel can strand funds or trigger unlock aborts.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require mutable-config transition tests for lock-accounting changes (for example, place under one fee config and cancel/settle after fee updates), and prefer storing exact per-order locked amounts when unlock depends on mutable protocol parameters.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The fix-cancel-fee-reserve review found cancel computes fee reserve from current bps in contracts/sources/cancel.move:124, while order lock sizing is done at placement time in order_placement.move and fee config is admin-updatable in fees.move.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add mission/library convention text for lock-accounting invariants tied to mutable protocol parameters.
rejectedObservations.reason: This is normative and better owned by orchestrator guidance/skill updates; no low-risk factual services.yaml or library additive update was identified this round.
